name: Impending Doom
description: This model gains the following ability:

granted_abilities.name: The End Beckons:
granted_abilities.text: During the end phase, if this model has LoS to an enemy The Bad Omen it must discard a card of value 9 or higher, drain a (soulstone), or be killed. Then, regardless of whether an enemy The Bad Omen is in LoS, discard this upgrade.
